name: Roy Kral
abstract: Roy Kral (October 10, 1921 – August 2, 2002) was an American jazz pianist, arranger, and vocalist. Known for his partnership with his wife Jackie Cain as the duo Jackie and Roy, he was also the brother of the singer Irene Kral and the father of actress Tiffany Bolling.

interviews.title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Dave McKenna
about_quotes.evidence: You see Roy and Jackie, Jackie Cain and Roy Kral had left, and then they got another piano player for a few months, and then they called me.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave McKenna interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Ed Shaughnessy Part I
about_quotes.evidence: He had these two singers, Jackie Cain and Roy Kral, and they were doing the wordless vocals [scats].
about_quotes.doc_title: Ed Shaughnessy Part I interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 1, 1995 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Candoli
about_quotes.evidence: It had Jackie Cain and Roy Kral, and anyway it was a good little band.

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Powell
about_quotes.evidence: I think Jackie Cain and Roy Kral, Jackie & Roy were singing with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Benny Powell interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 16, 1999 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] So she was Roy Kral's sister. [INTERVIEWEE] Oh yeah.
